name: git stash
description: Temporarily save uncommitted changes to a stack so you can work on something else and reapply them later

options.label: Message
options.description: Add a descriptive message to the stash entry

options.label: Include untracked
options.description: Also stash untracked files that are not yet being tracked by git

options.label: Keep index
options.description: Keep changes that have already been staged in the index

choices.label: Push
choices.description: Save your local modifications to a new stash entry

choices.label: Pop
choices.description: Apply the most recent stash and remove it from the stack

choices.label: Apply
choices.description: Apply the most recent stash but keep it on the stack

choices.label: Drop
choices.description: Remove a single stash entry from the stack

examples.label: Stash changes with a message including untracked files
Apply the most recent stash and remove it

values.message: WIP: saving work before branch switch

examples.label: Apply last stash without removing it
Stash only unstaged changes (keep staged work)
